code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut best = ""
mut best_len = 0
mut i = 0
while i < list.len(words)
  match list.get(words, i)
  when Some(w)
    let n = string.len(w)
    if n > best_len
      best = w
      best_len = n
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("longest=#{best}")
